supervisor.reason: The daemonize feature is implemented and validated: the CLI now supports daemonize mode, daemon JSON config parsing, prompt queue ordering, inotify-first watcher selection with polling fallback, per-phase external CLI execution, result report generation, and focused tests all passed.

bootstrap.goal: Add a daemonize mode that watches prompt files from JSON configuration and executes dormammu loops in sorted queue order.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the daemonize feature implementation and focused validation. The next step is commit preparation or optional follow-up hardening for daemon lifecycle behavior.

items.text: Phase 1. Define the `daemonize` operating model, JSON schema, queue ordering rules, and the separation between built-in workflow skills and external phase-specific agent CLI commands
Phase 2. Add configuration loading and CLI entrypoints for daemon mode, including schema validation and defaults for inotify-first monitoring with a 60-second polling fallback
Phase 3. Implement the daemon watcher, prompt queue ordering, per-prompt loop execution, and result artifact generation based on the configured prompt and result directories
Phase 4. Wire phase execution so plan, design, develop, build/deploy, test/review, and commit can each resolve skill instructions separately from the configured external agent CLI command
Phase 5. Add unit and integration coverage for config parsing, watcher behavior, queue sorting, fallback polling, and end-to-end daemon processing

next_action: Prepare a commit for the daemonize implementation, or continue with follow-up hardening such as config reload, archival semantics, or richer daemon lifecycle management.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
A new prompt-driven scope now targets daemonized prompt watching from JSON configuration.
The repository does not currently contain .dev/PROJECT.md or .dev/ROADMAP.md, so planning is grounded in the direct request, AGENTS.md, current code, and machine state.
Daemon mode needs inotify-first monitoring with a 60-second polling fallback where inode-backed watching is unavailable.
The feature request requires separating dormammu workflow skills from per-phase external agent CLI command configuration.
The daemonize design is captured in docs/daemonize-design.md and has been implemented in the new backend/dormammu/daemon package.
Focused validation passed through python3 -m unittest tests.test_daemon.
Focused validation passed through python3 -m unittest tests.test_cli.
Focused validation passed through python3 -m unittest tests.test_agent_cli_adapter tests.test_loop_runner.
